creator: georg@graf.priv.at
text:
The card is not found in the pccard.conf file, it is a 
	Genius "Ethernet ME3000II SE" NE2000 clone, providing 10Mb/s
	through either a BNC or a 10BaseT interface.
	It works, if i give it an entry in the pccard.conf file.
	If you like me to, I can send you the output of the cis-dump.
	Thank you!

Fix: 

io 0x240-0x380
	.
	.
	.
	card "PCMCIA" "PCMCIA-ETHERNET-CARD"
	config 0x20 "ed0" ?
